summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for Decision Amplifiers module. All 13 test requirements PASSED. Route /amplifiers is accessible, page loads correctly with all sections (Architecture Map, Visibility Layer, Trust Layer, Activation Layer, SCI, Governance Principles). EN/FR translation toggle works perfectly.

route_accessibility.details: Route /amplifiers accessible and page loads correctly with data-testid='decision-amplifiers-page'

sidebar_menu.details: Decision Amplifiers appears between Decision Gates and Sources & Method in sidebar

infrastructure.details: data-testid='layer-infrastructure' - clickable, shows metrics when expanded

visibility.details: data-testid='layer-visibility' - clickable, shows metrics when expanded

trust.details: data-testid='layer-trust' - clickable, shows metrics when expanded

activation.details: data-testid='layer-activation' - clickable, shows metrics (Activation Readiness, Response Rate, Meeting Conversion)

intent_clusters.details: 4 intent clusters found with urgency badges U3, U4, U5, U3 (Capacity Expansion, Operational Stress, Strategic Restructuring, Digital Transformation)

network_metrics.details: Network Decision Metrics displayed: 6.8 (Avg Decision Makers), 4 (LinkedIn Touchpoints), 21 (Trust Building Days), 3.4% (Executive Engagement Rate)

reference_sources.details: All 3 reference sources displayed: Edelman Trust Barometer, LinkedIn B2B Institute, Gartner B2B Buying Study

activation_logic_chain.details: 4 steps displayed: Intent Capture → Network Validation → Targeted Approach → Uncertainty Reduction

sci_component_breakdown.details: 5 components displayed: DRS (25%) 72/100, URI (25%) 68/100, Intent Coverage (20%) 55/100, Trust Signal (15%) 48/100, Activation Readiness (15%) 62/100

governance_principles.details: All 4 rules displayed: Explicit metrics when robust, Indexed metrics for sensitive areas, Architecture before tools, Coherence before amplification

language_toggle_en_fr.details: Toggle works correctly, switches all content between English and French

french_translation.details: Complete French translation verified: Title (Amplificateurs de Décision), Subtitle, Hero text, all sections, all content including Intent Clusters, Network Metrics, SCI, Governance Principles

critical_code_review_comments: Excellent implementation of Decision Amplifiers module with all required sections
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
i18n implementation complete with EN/FR translations for all content
SCI calculation working correctly using weighted composite formula
Responsive design appears correct with sidebar navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decision Amplifiers module fully tested and working. All features implemented: 4-layer architecture map, intent clusters with urgency badges, network metrics, reference sources, activation logic chain, SCI gauge with component breakdown, governance principles. Complete EN/FR translation working via language toggle.
